<?php /** * DirectoryString * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * DirectoryString * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class DirectoryString { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_CHOICE, 'children' => [ 'teletexString' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_TELETEX_STRING], 'printableString' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_PRINTABLE_STRING], 'universalString' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_UNIVERSAL_STRING], 'utf8String' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_UTF8_STRING], 'bmpString' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_BMP_STRING] ] ]; }
